arts.ttl: After six years, Manchester United finally score at Anfield
arts.sum: Six years on from the last Manchester United goal at Anfield, Lisandro Martínez fired the Red Devils into a shock lead on Merseyside. Lisandro Martínez surged upfield to apply pressure to the Liverpool midfield, helped his team regain possession and continued his run forward.

arts.ttl: Liverpool fans double down on Mo Salah demand during Man Utd clash
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah revealed he was "far away" from agreeing fresh terms at Liverpool this week and supporters have urged the club to give in to his salary demands after unveiling a banner during their clash with Manchester United

arts.ttl: Real Madrid blow! Trent Alexander-Arnold tipped to join Tranmere Rovers
arts.sum: Roy Keane has tipped Trent Alexander-Arnold to join Tranmere Rovers instead of Real Madrid following his first-half performance against Manchester United. Trent Alexander-Arnold to join Real Madrid?

arts.ttl: Roy Keane dishes out hilarious putdown of 'Tranmere' Trent Alexander-Arnold after his first-half display against Man United at Anfield as ex-Red Devils captain slams 'schoolboy' defending
arts.sum: Roy Keane has blasted Trent Alexander-Arnold's 'schoolboy' defending during the first half of Liverpool's clash with Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Manchester United transfer latest: Ruben Amorim blow as Arsenal, Red Devils transfer target set to sign new deal with Premier League club
arts.sum: Manchester United and Arsenal suffer a blow in pursuit of one of the Premier League's best attacking players as he is set to sign a new deal with his club.

arts.ttl: Liverpool fans demand FSG action over Mo Salah, Virgil van Dijk, and Trent Alexander-Arnold as Kop banner tells club owners to 'cough up the dough' over new contracts
arts.sum: Liverpool supporters have demanded the club's owners do everything in their power to convince Mohamed Salah , Virgil van Dijk , and Trent Alexander-Arnold to sign new contracts.

arts.ttl: Roy Keane rips into 'disgraceful' Man United flops and singles out four players who must improve after showing 'no reaction' in horror start under Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: United have lost six of their first 11 games since Amorim took charge, leaving them 14th in the Premier League ahead of their trip to runaway leaders Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Roy Keane fumes at 'disgraceful' Man Utd flops and calls out four players
arts.sum: Manchester United have endured a tough season despite changing managers, and their former captain Roy Keane has taken aim at their expensively-assembled group of players

arts.ttl: Man Utd latest: Rashford 'in talks' to join European giants
arts.sum: Manchester United reportedly want to offload Marcus Rashford during the January transfer window and a move to AC Milan is now on the cards. News of Milan’s interest in Rashford comes following his recent admission that he is keen to leave Man Utd in 2025.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim provides Marcus Rashford update after wantaway star is again left out of Red Devils squad for huge Liverpool clash
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has explained Marcus Rashford's absence after the wantaway forward was left out of Manchester United 's squad for Sunday's trip to rivals Liverpool.
